Explanation/index 'placement rule' contributing checklist (mechanical: 'which mode is the reader's posture?') — governs where any NEW page goes, embedded in Contributing.
summary: Page-by-page migration map from today's 119 narrative md pages + 5 hand-written api/ pages + ~80 examples + predictions.ipynb + root meta to the chosen HYBRID IA (strict-Diátaxis SSOT backbone + FastAPI Tutorial spine + generated Reference/gallery + walled-off Contributing). Borrowed patterns are named per estate: Diátaxis four-mode split and the structural SSOT law ('Explanation owns why, Reference owns signatures, they only link') as the backbone; FastAPI's tutorial-first single linear rail with one-CTA-per-on-ramp and one-concept-per-page as the Tutorials arm; scikit-learn's User-Guide(How-to)+API-Reference+executable-gallery separation; Polars/Pydantic mkdocs-material clarity + mode badges; and scikit-learn/Candidate-3's generate-from-source (autosummary-recursive + sphinx-gallery) for the drift-prone Reference and Examples estates. The four competing front doors collapse to ONE thin router: getting_started/concepts.md, persona_paths.md, onboarding/index.md are DELETED; ai_onboarding.md and Roadmap.md leave the human toctree (→ llms.txt / docs/_internal). The api/ tree is DISSOLVED into reference/ (storage/workspace merged then api twins deleted; module_api+sklearn folded into curated public-API pages; 357 stubs replaced by an autosummary-recursive root; combination_generator + the flat configuration.md merged away), making 'two trees document one surface' structurally impossible (#18). All user_guide/* re-homed into How-to with embedded concepts stripped up to a single Explanation home (concepts/ promoted + onboarding/* + scoring_and_refit absorbed). All 8 hand-written examples wrapper pages are deleted and regenerated as a gallery from the real examples/*.py; predictions.ipynb converts to R04_visualization.py. Every audit defect #1–#40 is folded into a specific page's disposition note, and the audit's four §8 mandates (one learning path/one SSOT, style-as-infrastructure, docs-in-the-safety-net, metadata-from-source) are carried by the new STYLE.md, the generated estates, and the About/llms.txt source-templating. Every existing top-level area is covered: getting_started, concepts, onboarding, ai_onboarding, user_guide/*, reference/*, api/*, developer/*, migration/*, examples/* (incl. predictions.ipynb), and root meta.
